h40289969g4253g4a89gbbd7g735f76d3a446: Much better. That human skin is fierce restrictive.
hdc735905gc242g4c5cga0f5g6957993d1564: So the brothers were right. You are a hag.
h611c4ce9g654fg444cgb6dfg27c513a62a08: Indeed I am. And a fabulous one at that.
h6d14e094g0f05g440egaba8gbe732fad7186: Not many get to see a hag in all her glory. Consider yourself blessed.
he27d5b66g9df9g4ba8ga774g9f915b114e5a: Now choose. Which eye will it be? Right or left?
ha7fc8bc8g8db7g4cb0g8a5bg8156caf46764: Hold onto your knickers. This might sting a bit.
hf2d4f52cg8908g4dddg8a10g1185c46f4034: Now - that wasn't so bad, was it?
h83c621c0gcf4dg43c0gae80g4f5e198e8431: Check that your eye is still there.
h984834f1gfe9cg4138gacebgabcb23c69cf3: Now - unless you want tentacles for a tongue, stay absolutely still.
h412a85d7gba79g44aag8479g33c0a2657685: I've removed one of these buggers before - but it's a touch tricky.
h573ded27gbfecg48cfg83b5ga64e89c50ae7: *The parasite squirms at the hag's words. Pain builds behind your eye.*
h5ab121abg6702g4e1fg8ad5ge14ebbcf422c: *You feel the creature writhe as it's dragged towards your ear...*
h69c2a12fgda7eg438bg877fg59e722b790d1: *... then it bites back, burrowing even deeper into your brain.*
heebc5162gcda6g48c6gafa2g54d7344a373c: You little shit - you didn't tell me it was Netherese. I'm not touching that.
h40d35f57ga5a5g49a2g952dgaa6adb4c21d7: Filthy shadow magic - brings nothing but chains and misery.
h30650ebcg7525g4878gb6cfg9404915d1875: How could I have missed the stink? Like blood and piss congealing on my tongue. Bleh.
h84907a2bgcc12g4716gae71gc56cd4ef6f04: Someone's tampered with your parasite. That's likely why you've not turned yet.
h4b90f2b0g3a0dg4379g9d32g0b8a7a224a09: Bless us, you're as slow as a wet week. That thing has been touched by more than mind flayers.
hf7b38708g895fg44ecga48dg3147c36dcc64: You're a dead soul walking. I can't help you.
h73c3c5bfgfb4cg47bcga8d5g614673cdd821: What about it? I held up my end of the bargain.
h1b7c7dd6g4c95g48c1gba2dg133f24707ca2: It's not my fault the wriggler's tainted by shadow magic. I want nothing to do with you or that scum in your brain.
h12aeb6f9g2692g4815ga82dg9f5b010d05ab: I'm not leaving. This wasn't the deal.
h9eafd0cagd390g419fg9960g775fff539ac3: You're bloody right it wasn't. I agreed to remove an illithid spawn. That thing is an abomination.
h5a1e4f6dgffceg427ag8b05g769c306bc590: But let it not be said that Auntie Ethel doesn't honour her debts.
h71d83f60g6c0cg4f8egaf98g892658526680: Here. It's on you to fix yourself.
h9e7e86b1g1802g409eg862dgd7743826e82d: Which is your way of saying - you're not powerful enough.
had93a263g57aag4310gb9f5g516b8cb96ede: I'd kill you for that - but why deny your wriggler the pleasure?
h106b9f54g4532g4c3aga09dgc66a0b0bce39: Then you're of no use to me.
h2287f3acg8157g494cg8a5fg12e7dfe6d6eb: You don't want to mess with such folk. Trust me - there are worse things than becoming a mind flayer.
h93d2af5fg64dfg4703gae0cgf3c845f8c0c1: Here. Don't let it be said that Auntie doesn't honour her deals. It's on you to fix yourself.
h8a8bb2b6gde81g44afgb309g7c6834cc64a2: I thought you could remove it?
hab2c0ac2g935dg4909ga49fg8f9b1889fe45: I can! But that thing has been touched by more than mind flayers.
hd5c10a98gf8abg4cc3gb198gf2fc43f50b43: All the more reason to remove it - or else.
h6da0104bg4265g4b18g83ddgccfecc9c417c: Strong and silent - good. You'll need it for this next bit.
hf1540d57g24f4g4828g8813g799aab919e4e: Hah! Oh, you do make me laugh.
h6f16eab9g0319g4d70g8691g2e1d6d03418a: What in all the spinning planes are you?
hcb305eccg920eg47c0g8cbege47b4c60506c: What in the hells are you?
h98e20c78g57f8g42e9ga79bg752344df32a1: Close that mouth, precious. Lest you swallow a fly.
h41006cb5g0893g477eg8f25g7fe3227f8948: Cute. Am I supposed to be impressed?
h656b9f57g978fg4b8dg8256g8c58351b62da: Well, yes - I should bloody think so.
h628d0c5fg54e5g4c9cg9a5fg3ceac9102c7c: Give me one reason why I shouldn't cut you down.
h1a76beddg60bcg48b4ga43bgfc905a5c4dcd: This is my house. And you will mind your manners - or I will use that empty skull of yours as a teapot.
he394bf02g996cg44f3g8f04ga8adf5c370d8: A green hag. And a powerful specimen, it seems.
hfd4992fbgb786g47b2gbbadg8ea127b0c9b0: Thank you, petal. It is so lovely to be appreciated.
h139d36a4g32f0g4c66ga764g071dee370aca: Magic is the lifeblood of hags. And I'm one of the best.
h53d30b84gbb4bg49b9gb66ag1b249e657032: Not you, you eejit. I need someone with two eyes in their skull.
h374b36adgc1f2g410dgad38g649f7f9af6ce: There you are. Now where were we?
